CustomField.description: Used in CSEVentProcessor Monthly & Weekly queries. 7/14/2023 Will be set by DLRS based on Active Contracts returning the minimum date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Field currently managed manually by Customer Success. As of July 2023 will be set by a rollup summary of the Active Contracts returning the minimum End Date plus 1.
CustomField.label: Next Renewal Date
